**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The true nature of Nanjing Haoyin Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. surfaces under forensic-level cleansing. The official registration system shackled this company with the heavy-industry tag of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the physical parameters present an extreme contrast: the 2024 insured employee count is a mere '1', and the physical registered address is 'Room 22085, 14th Floor' of an office building at No. 211 Taiping South Road. Operating an electronic device manufacturing plant on the 14th floor of an office building with a single person completely violates spatial common sense. Combined with its company name 'Haoyin (Good Sound)' and its exceptionally long-tail business license (covering stage engineering construction, audio equipment sales, slide/projection equipment sales, wedding etiquette services, etc.), a precise diagnosis is achieved: this is definitively not a manufacturer, but a typical AV Engineering System Integrator and Stage Equipment Leasing Trade Proxy. It functions as the audio-visual lighting equipment supplier and construction intermediary behind exhibitions, weddings, and performances.
